raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Gigi Crowder has worked tirelessly to dismantle the stigma surrounding mental health.",
    "Gigi Crowder has served for over 9 years as the Ethnic Services Manager for Alameda County Behavioral Health Care Services.",
    "Gigi Crowder has worked in the Behavioral Health Care field for more than 25 years.",
    "Gigi Crowder is a strong advocate for promoting culturally responsive behavioral health services for all consumers and family members.",
    "The '40 Voices Campaign' was created to advocate for an African American Holistic & Resource Hub.",
    "Gigi Crowder promotes utilizing resources found in faith/spiritual communities.",
    "Gigi Crowder and her team at NAMI Contra Costa created community defined strategies for unserved, underserved, and inappropriately served ethnic and cultural communities.",
    "Gigi Crowder was inducted into the Alameda County Women Hall of Fame for her work in developing programs to enhance employment opportunities for individuals with psychiatric challenges.",
    "Gigi Crowder received the 2013 MHAAC Mental Health Achievement Award.",
    "Gigi Crowder received the 2016 Multi-Cultural Outreach Award from NAMI California.",
    "Gigi Crowder was honored as the 2022 Contra Costa County Adult Humanitarian.",
    "Gigi Crowder received the 2023 East Bay Leadership Council's Change Agent Award."
  ]
}
```
